tool.name: Memory
tool.describe: Placeholder for the later reflection boundary.

action.instructions: Reserved: create one typed candidate from a witnessed batch.
Reserved: validate and commit one candidate through the loader.
Reserved: copy one exact immutable event into short-term memory.
Reserved: discard a recall copy without changing the archive.
